1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PreBindStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(`running PreBind plugin \"TestPlugin\": %w`, errInjectedStatus)),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"UnschedulableAndSuccessPreBindPlugin\",\n\t\t\tplugins: []*TestPlugin{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PreBindStatus: int(framework.Unschedulable)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin 1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PreBindStatus: int(framework.Success)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Unschedulable, injectReason).WithPlugin(\"TestPlugin\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tregistry := Registry{}\n\t\t\tconfigPlugins := &config.Plugins{}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, pl := range tt.plugins {\n\t\t\t\ttmpPl := pl\n\t\t\t\tif err := registry.Register(pl.name, func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn tmpPl, nil\n\t\t\t\t}); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Unable to register pre bind plugins: %s\", pl.name)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tconfigPlugins.PreBind.Enabled = append(\n\t\t\t\t\tconfigPlugins.PreBind.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\t\tconfig.Plugin{Name: pl.name},\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{Plugins: configPlugins}\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tf, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, registry, profile)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"fail to create framework: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstatus := f.RunPreBindPlugins(ctx, nil, pod, \"\")\n\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(status, tt.wantStatus) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong status code. got %v, want %v\", status, tt.wantStatus)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc injectReason).WithPlugin(\"TestPlugin\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"SuccessSuccessReservePlugins\",\n\t\t\tplugins: []*TestPlugin{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj: {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tregistry := Registry{}\n\t\t\tconfigPlugins := &config.Plugins{}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, pl := range tt.plugins {\n\t\t\t\ttmpPl := pl\n\t\t\t\tif err := registry.Register(pl.name, func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn tmpPl, nil\n\t\t\t\t}); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Unable to register pre bind plugins: %s\", pl.name)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tconfigPlugins.Reserve.Enabled = append(\n\t\t\t\t\tconfigPlugins.Reserve.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\t\tconfig.Plugin{Name: pl.name},\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{Plugins: configPlugins}\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tf, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, registry, profile)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"fail to create framework: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstatus := f.RunReservePluginsReserve(ctx, nil, pod, \"\")\n\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(status, tt.wantStatus) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong status code. got %v, want %v\", status, tt.wantStatus)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestPermitPlugins(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname    string\n\t\tplugins []*TestPlugin\n\t\twant    *framework.Status\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"NilPermitPlugin\",\n\t\t\tplugins: framework.NewStatus(framework.Unschedulable, injectReason).WithPlugin(\"TestPlugin\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"ErrorPermitPlugin\",\n\t\t\tplugins: []*TestPlugin{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(`running Permit plugin \"TestPlugin\": %w`, errInjectedStatus)).WithPlugin(\"TestPlugin\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"UnschedulableAndUnresolvablePermitPlugin\",\n\t\t\tplugins: []*TestPlugin{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: framework.NewStatus(framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable, injectReason).WithPlugin(\"TestPlugin\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"WaitPermitPlugin\",\n\t\t\tplugins: []*TestPlugin{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Wait)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: framework.NewStatus(framework.Wait, `one or more plugins asked to wait and no plugin rejected pod \"\"`),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"SuccessSuccessPermitPlugin\",\n\t\t\tplugins: []*TestPlugin{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Success)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin 1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Success)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: nil,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"ErrorAndErrorPlugins\",\n\t\t\tplugins: []*TestPlugin{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tname: \"TestPlugin 1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tinj:  injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(`running Permit plugin \"TestPlugin\": %w`, errInjectedStatus)).WithPlugin(\"TestPlugin\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tregistry := Registry{}\n\t\t\tconfigPlugins := &config.Plugins{}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, pl := range tt.plugins {\n\t\t\t\ttmpPl := pl\n\t\t\t\tif err := registry.Register(pl.name, func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn tmpPl, nil\n\t\t\t\t}); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Unable to register Permit plugin: %s\", pl.name)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tconfigPlugins.Permit.Enabled = append(\n\t\t\t\t\tconfigPlugins.Permit.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\t\tconfig.Plugin{Name: pl.name},\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{Plugins: configPlugins}\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tf, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, registry, profile)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"fail to create framework: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstatus := f.RunPermitPlugins(ctx, nil, pod, \"\")\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(status, tt.want) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong status code. got %v, want %v\", status, tt.want)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// withMetricsRecorder set metricsRecorder for the scheduling frameworkImpl.\nfunc withMetricsRecorder(recorder *metrics.MetricAsyncRecorder) Option {\n\treturn func(o *frameworkOptions) {\n\t\to.metricsRecorder = recorder\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRecordingMetrics(t *testing.T) {\n\tstate := &framework.CycleState{}\n\tstate.SetRecordPluginMetrics(true)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname               string\n\t\taction             func(f framework.Framework)\n\t\tinject             injectedResult\n\t\twantExtensionPoint string\n\t\twantStatus         framework.Code\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"PreFilter - Success\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPreFilterPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod) },\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"PreFilter\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"PreScore - Success\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPreScorePlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, nil) },\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"PreScore\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Score - Success\",\n\t\t\taction: func(f framework.Framework) {\n\t\t\t\tf.RunScorePlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, BuildNodeInfos(nodes))\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Score\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"Reserve - Success\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunReservePluginsReserve(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Reserve\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"Unreserve - Success\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunReservePluginsUnreserve(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Unreserve\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"PreBind - Success\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPreBindPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"PreBind\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"Bind - Success\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunBindPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Bind\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"PostBind - Success\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPostBindPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"PostBind\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"Permit - Success\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPermitPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Permit\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"PreFilter - Error\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPreFilterPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod) },\n\t\t\tinject:             injectedResult{PreFilterStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"PreFilter\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"PreScore - Error\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPreScorePlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, nil) },\n\t\t\tinject:             injectedResult{PreScoreStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"PreScore\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Score - Error\",\n\t\t\taction: func(f framework.Framework) {\n\t\t\t\tf.RunScorePlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, BuildNodeInfos(nodes))\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tinject:             injectedResult{ScoreStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Score\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"Reserve - Error\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunReservePluginsReserve(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\tinject:             injectedResult{ReserveStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Reserve\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"PreBind - Error\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPreBindPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\tinject:             injectedResult{PreBindStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"PreBind\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"Bind - Error\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunBindPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\tinject:             injectedResult{BindStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Bind\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"Permit - Error\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPermitPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\tinject:             injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Error)},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Permit\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:               \"Permit - Wait\",\n\t\t\taction:             func(f framework.Framework) { f.RunPermitPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\") },\n\t\t\tinject:             injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Wait)},\n\t\t\twantExtensionPoint: \"Permit\",\n\t\t\twantStatus:         framework.Wait,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmetrics.Register()\n\t\t\tmetrics.FrameworkExtensionPointDuration.Reset()\n\t\t\tmetrics.PluginExecutionDuration.Reset()\n\n\t\t\tplugin := &TestPlugin{name: testPlugin, inj: tt.inject}\n\t\t\tr := make(Registry)\n\t\t\tr.Register(testPlugin,\n\t\t\t\tfunc(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, fh framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn plugin, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tpluginSet := config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 1}}}\n\t\t\tplugins := &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tScore:     pluginSet,\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter: pluginSet,\n\t\t\t\tFilter:    pluginSet,\n\t\t\t\tPreScore:  pluginSet,\n\t\t\t\tReserve:   pluginSet,\n\t\t\t\tPermit:    pluginSet,\n\t\t\t\tPreBind:   pluginSet,\n\t\t\t\tBind:      pluginSet,\n\t\t\t\tPostBind:  pluginSet,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\n\t\t\trecorder := metrics.NewMetricsAsyncRecorder(100, time.Nanosecond, ctx.Done())\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\tPercentageOfNodesToScore: ptr.To[int32](testPercentageOfNodesToScore),\n\t\t\t\tSchedulerName:            testProfileName,\n\t\t\t\tPlugins:                  plugins,\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tf, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, r, profile, withMetricsRecorder(recorder))\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcancel()\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create framework for testing: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttt.action(f)\n\n\t\t\t// Stop the goroutine which records metrics and ensure it's stopped.\n\t\t\tcancel()\n\t\t\t<-recorder.IsStoppedCh\n\t\t\t// Try to clean up the metrics buffer again in case it's not empty.\n\t\t\trecorder.FlushMetrics()\n\n\t\t\tcollectAndCompareFrameworkMetrics(t, tt.wantExtensionPoint, tt.wantStatus)\n\t\t\tcollectAndComparePluginMetrics(t, tt.wantExtensionPoint, testPlugin, tt.wantStatus)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRunBindPlugins(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tinjects    []framework.Code\n\t\twantStatus framework.Code\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"simple success\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Success},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"error on second\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Skip, framework.Error, framework.Success},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"all skip\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Skip, framework.Skip, framework.Skip},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Skip,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"error on third, but not reached\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Skip, framework.Success, framework.Error},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"no bind plugin, returns default binder\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"invalid status\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Unschedulable},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Unschedulable,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"simple error\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Error},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"success on second, returns success\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Skip, framework.Success},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"invalid status, returns error\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Skip, framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"error after success status, returns success\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Success, framework.Error},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"success before invalid status, returns success\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Success, framework.Error},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Success,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"success after error status, returns error\",\n\t\t\tinjects:    []framework.Code{framework.Error, framework.Success},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.Error,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmetrics.Register()\n\t\t\tmetrics.FrameworkExtensionPointDuration.Reset()\n\t\t\tmetrics.PluginExecutionDuration.Reset()\n\n\t\t\tpluginSet := config.PluginSet{}\n\t\t\tr := make(Registry)\n\t\t\tfor i, inj := range tt.injects {\n\t\t\t\tname := fmt.Sprintf(\"bind-%d\", i)\n\t\t\t\tplugin := &TestPlugin{name: name, inj: injectedResult{BindStatus: int(inj)}}\n\t\t\t\tr.Register(name,\n\t\t\t\t\tfunc(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, fh framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn plugin, nil\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\tpluginSet.Enabled = append(pluginSet.Enabled, config.Plugin{Name: name})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tplugins := &config.Plugins{Bind: pluginSet}\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\trecorder := metrics.NewMetricsAsyncRecorder(100, time.Nanosecond, ctx.Done())\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\tSchedulerName:            testProfileName,\n\t\t\t\tPercentageOfNodesToScore: ptr.To[int32](testPercentageOfNodesToScore),\n\t\t\t\tPlugins:                  plugins,\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfwk, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, r, profile, withMetricsRecorder(recorder))\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcancel()\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tst := fwk.RunBindPlugins(context.Background(), state, pod, \"\")\n\t\t\tif st.Code() != tt.wantStatus {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"got status code %s, want %s\", st.Code(), tt.wantStatus)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Stop the goroutine which records metrics and ensure it's stopped.\n\t\t\tcancel()\n\t\t\t<-recorder.IsStoppedCh\n\t\t\t// Try to clean up the metrics buffer again in case it's not empty.\n\t\t\trecorder.FlushMetrics()\n\t\t\tcollectAndCompareFrameworkMetrics(t, \"Bind\", tt.wantStatus)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestPermitWaitDurationMetric(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname    string\n\t\tinject  injectedResult\n\t\twantRes string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"WaitOnPermit - No Wait\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"WaitOnPermit - Wait Timeout\",\n\t\t\tinject:  injectedResult{PermitStatus: int(framework.Wait)},\n\t\t\twantRes: \"Unschedulable\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmetrics.Register()\n\t\t\tmetrics.PermitWaitDuration.Reset()\n\n\t\t\tplugin := &TestPlugin{name: testPlugin, inj: tt.inject}\n\t\t\tr := make(Registry)\n\t\t\terr := r.Register(testPlugin,\n\t\t\t\tfunc(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, fh framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn plugin, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tplugins := &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tPermit: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 1}}},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{Plugins: plugins}\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tf, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, r, profile)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create framework for testing: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tf.RunPermitPlugins(ctx, nil, pod, \"\")\n\t\t\tf.WaitOnPermit(ctx, pod)\n\n\t\t\tcollectAndComparePermitWaitDuration(t, tt.wantRes)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestWaitOnPermit(t *testing.T) {\n\tpod := &v1.Pod{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName: \"pod\",\n\t\t\tUID:  types.UID(\"pod\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname   string\n\t\taction func(f framework.Framework)\n\t\twant   *framework.Status\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Reject Waiting Pod\",\n\t\t\taction: func(f framework.Framework) {\n\t\t\t\tf.GetWaitingPod(pod.UID).Reject(permitPlugin, \"reject message\")\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: framework.NewStatus(framework.Unschedulable, \"reject message\").WithPlugin(permitPlugin),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Allow Waiting Pod\",\n\t\t\taction: func(f framework.Framework) {\n\t\t\t\tf.GetWaitingPod(pod.UID).Allow(permitPlugin)\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: nil,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\ttestPermitPlugin := &TestPermitPlugin{}\n\t\t\tr := make(Registry)\n\t\t\tr.Register(permitPlugin,\n\t\t\t\tfunc(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, fh framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn testPermitPlugin, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tplugins := &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tPermit: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: permitPlugin, Weight: 1}}},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{Plugins: plugins}\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tf, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, r, profile)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create framework for testing: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trunPermitPluginsStatus := f.RunPermitPlugins(ctx, nil, pod, \"\")\n\t\t\tif runPermitPluginsStatus.Code() != framework.Wait {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected RunPermitPlugins to return status %v, but got %v\",\n\t\t\t\t\tframework.Wait, runPermitPluginsStatus.Code())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tgo tt.action(f)\n\n\t\t\tgot := f.WaitOnPermit(ctx, pod)\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(tt.want, got) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected status: want %v, but got %v\", tt.want, got)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestListPlugins(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname    string\n\t\tplugins *config.Plugins\n\t\twant    *config.Plugins\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"Add empty plugin\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{},\n\t\t\twant: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: queueSortPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:      config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: bindPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Add multiple plugins\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: scorePlugin1, Weight: 3}, {Name: scoreWithNormalizePlugin1}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: queueSortPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:      config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: bindPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tScore:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: scorePlugin1, Weight: 3}, {Name: scoreWithNormalizePlugin1, Weight: 1}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{Plugins: tt.plugins}\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tf, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, registry, profile)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create framework for testing: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tgot := f.ListPlugins()\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(tt.want, got); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected plugins (-want,+got):\\n%s\", diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestClose(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname    string\n\t\tplugins *config.Plugins\n\t\twantErr error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"close doesn't return error\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 5},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"close returns error\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 5},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testCloseErrorPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: errClose,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tfw, err := NewFramework(ctx, registry, &config.KubeSchedulerProfile{Plugins: tc.plugins})\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Unexpected error during calling NewFramework, got %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\terr = fw.Close()\n\t\t\tif !errors.Is(err, tc.wantErr) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Unexpected error from Close(), got: %v, want: %v\", err, tc.wantErr)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc buildScoreConfigDefaultWeights(ps ...string) *config.Plugins {\n\treturn buildScoreConfigWithWeights(defaultWeights, ps...)\n}\n\nfunc buildScoreConfigWithWeights(weights map[string]int32, ps ...string) *config.Plugins {\n\tvar plugins []config.Plugin\n\tfor _, p := range ps {\n\t\tplugins = append(plugins, config.Plugin{Name: p, Weight: weights[p]})\n\t}\n\treturn &config.Plugins{Score: config.PluginSet{Enabled: plugins}}\n}\n\ntype injectedResult struct {\n\tScoreRes                 int64                      `json:\"scoreRes,omitempty\"`\n\tNormalizeRes             int64                      `json:\"normalizeRes,omitempty\"`\n\tScoreStatus              int                        `json:\"scoreStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tNormalizeStatus          int                        `json:\"normalizeStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tPreFilterResult          *framework.PreFilterResult `json:\"preFilterResult,omitempty\"`\n\tPreFilterStatus          int                        `json:\"preFilterStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tPreFilterAddPodStatus    int                        `json:\"preFilterAddPodStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tPreFilterRemovePodStatus int                        `json:\"preFilterRemovePodStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tFilterStatus             int                        `json:\"filterStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tPostFilterStatus         int                        `json:\"postFilterStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tPreScoreStatus           int                        `json:\"preScoreStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tReserveStatus            int                        `json:\"reserveStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tPreBindStatus            int                        `json:\"preBindStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tBindStatus               int                        `json:\"bindStatus,omitempty\"`\n\tPermitStatus             int                        `json:\"permitStatus,omitempty\"`\n}\n\nfunc setScoreRes(inj injectedResult) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\tif framework.Code(inj.ScoreStatus) != framework.Success {\n\t\treturn 0, framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(inj.ScoreStatus), \"injecting failure.\")\n\t}\n\treturn inj.ScoreRes, nil\n}\n\nfunc injectNormalizeRes(inj injectedResult, scores framework.NodeScoreList) *framework.Status {\n\tif framework.Code(inj.NormalizeStatus) != framework.Success {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(inj.NormalizeStatus), \"injecting failure.\")\n\t}\n\tfor i := range scores {\n\t\tscores[i].Score = inj.NormalizeRes\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc collectAndComparePluginMetrics(t *testing.T, wantExtensionPoint, wantPlugin string, wantStatus framework.Code) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\tm := metrics.PluginExecutionDuration.WithLabelValues(wantPlugin, wantExtensionPoint, wantStatus.String())\n\n\tcount, err := testutil.GetHistogramMetricCount(m)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to get %s sampleCount, err: %v\", metrics.PluginExecutionDuration.Name, err)\n\t}\n\tif count == 0 {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Expect at least 1 sample\")\n\t}\n\tvalue, err := testutil.GetHistogramMetricValue(m)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to get %s value, err: %v\", metrics.PluginExecutionDuration.Name, err)\n\t}\n\tcheckLatency(t, value)\n}\n\nfunc collectAndCompareFrameworkMetrics(t *testing.T, wantExtensionPoint string, wantStatus framework.Code) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\tm := metrics.FrameworkExtensionPointDuration.WithLabelValues(wantExtensionPoint, wantStatus.String(), testProfileName)\n\n\tcount, err := testutil.GetHistogramMetricCount(m)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to get %s sampleCount, err: %v\", metrics.FrameworkExtensionPointDuration.Name, err)\n\t}\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expect 1 sample, got: %v\", count)\n\t}\n\tvalue, err := testutil.GetHistogramMetricValue(m)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to get %s value, err: %v\", metrics.FrameworkExtensionPointDuration.Name, err)\n\t}\n\tcheckLatency(t, value)\n}\n\nfunc collectAndComparePermitWaitDuration(t *testing.T, wantRes string) {\n\tm := metrics.PermitWaitDuration.WithLabelValues(wantRes)\n\tcount, err := testutil.GetHistogramMetricCount(m)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to get %s sampleCount, err: %v\", metrics.PermitWaitDuration.Name, err)\n\t}\n\tif wantRes == \"\" {\n\t\tif count != 0 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expect 0 sample, got: %v\", count)\n\t\t}\n\t} else {\n\t\tif count != 1 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expect 1 sample, got: %v\", count)\n\t\t}\n\t\tvalue, err := testutil.GetHistogramMetricValue(m)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to get %s value, err: %v\", metrics.PermitWaitDuration.Name, err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tcheckLatency(t, value)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc mustNewPodInfo(t *testing.T, pod *v1.Pod) *framework.PodInfo {\n\tpodInfo, err := framework.NewPodInfo(pod)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t}\n\treturn podInfo\n}\n\n// BuildNodeInfos build NodeInfo slice from a v1.Node slice\nfunc BuildNodeInfos(nodes []*v1.Node) []*framework.NodeInfo {\n\tres := make([]*framework.NodeInfo, len(nodes))\n\tfor i := 0; i < len(nodes); i++ {\n\t\tres[i] = framework.NewNodeInfo()\n\t\tres[i].SetNode(nodes[i])\n\t}\n\treturn res\n}\n",

\"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n\t\"k8s.io/client-go/tools/events\"\n\t\"k8s.io/klog/v2/ktesting\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/apis/config\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n\tframeworkruntime \"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime\"\n)\n\nvar fakeRegistry = frameworkruntime.Registry{\n\t\"QueueSort\": newFakePlugin(\"QueueSort\"),\n\t\"Bind1\":     newFakePlugin(\"Bind1\"),\n\t\"Bind2\":     newFakePlugin(\"Bind2\"),\n\t\"Another\":   newFakePlugin(\"Another\"),\n}\n\nfunc TestNewMap(t *testing.T) {\n\tcases := []struct {\n\t\tname    string\n\t\tcfgs    []config.KubeSchedulerProfile\n\t\twantErr string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"valid\",\n\t\t\tcfgs: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-2\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"Bind2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &runtime.Unknown{Raw: []byte(\"{}\")},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"different queue sort\",\n\t\t\tcfgs: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-2\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Another\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: \"different queue sort plugins\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"different queue sort args\",\n\t\t\tcfgs: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"QueueSort\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &runtime.Unknown{Raw: []byte(\"{}\")},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-2\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: \"different queue sort plugin args\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"duplicate scheduler name\",\n\t\t\tcfgs: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: \"duplicate profile\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"scheduler name is needed\",\n\t\t\tcfgs: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBind: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"Bind1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: \"scheduler name is needed\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"plugins required for profile\",\n\t\t\tcfgs: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"profile-1\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: \"plugins required for profile\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"invalid framework configuration\",\n\t\t\tcfgs: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"invalid-profile\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tQueueSort: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"QueueSort\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: \"at least one bind plugin is needed\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tc := range cases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tm, err := NewMap(ctx, tc.cfgs, fakeRegistry, nilRecorderFactory)\n\t\t\tif err := checkErr(err, tc.wantErr); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif len(tc.wantErr) != 0 {\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif len(m) != len(tc.cfgs) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"got %d profiles, want %d\", len(m), len(tc.cfgs))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\ntype fakePlugin struct {\n\tname string\n}\n\nfunc (p *fakePlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn p.name\n}\n\nfunc (p *fakePlugin) Less(*framework.QueuedPodInfo, *framework.QueuedPodInfo) bool {\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (p *fakePlugin) Bind(context.Context, *framework.CycleState, *v1.Pod, string) *framework.Status {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc newFakePlugin(name string) func(ctx context.Context, object runtime.Object, handle framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &fakePlugin{name: name}, nil\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc nilRecorderFactory(_ string) events.EventRecorder {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc checkErr(err error, wantErr string) error {\n\tif len(wantErr) == 0 {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tif err == nil || !strings.Contains(err.Error(), wantErr) {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"got error %q, want %q\", err, wantErr)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n",

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/scheduler/testing/framework/framework_helpers.go",
  "newString": "KubeSchedulingProfile",
  "oldString": "KubeSchedulerProfile",
  "originalFile": "/*\nCopyright 2019 The Kubernetes Authors.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\n\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\npackage framework\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\"\n\tkubeschedulerconfigv1 \"k8s.io/kube-scheduler/config/v1\"\n\tschedulerapi \"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/apis/config\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/apis/config/scheme\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime\"\n)\n\nvar configDecoder = scheme.Codecs.UniversalDecoder()\n\n// NewFramework creates a Framework from the register functions and options.\nfunc NewFramework(ctx context.Context, fns []RegisterPluginFunc, profileName string, opts ...runtime.Option) (framework.Framework, error) {\n\tregistry := runtime.Registry{}\n\tprofile := &schedulerapi.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\tSchedulerName: profileName,\n\t\tPlugins:       &schedulerapi.Plugins{},\n\t}\n\tfor _, f := range fns {\n\t\tf(&registry, profile)\n\t}\n\treturn runtime.NewFramework(ctx, registry, profile, opts...)\n}\n\n// RegisterPluginFunc is a function signature used in method RegisterFilterPlugin()\n// to register a Filter Plugin to a given registry.\ntype RegisterPluginFunc func(reg *runtime.Registry, profile *schedulerapi.KubeSchedulerProfile)\n\n// RegisterQueueSortPlugin returns a function to register a QueueSort Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterQueueSortPlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName, pluginNewFunc, \"QueueSort\")\n}\n\n// RegisterPreFilterPlugin returns a function to register a PreFilter Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterPreFilterPlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName, pluginNewFunc, \"PreFilter\")\n}\n\n// RegisterFilterPlugin returns a function to register a Filter Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterFilterPlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName, pluginNewFunc, \"Filter\")\n}\n\n// RegisterReservePlugin returns a function to register a Reserve Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterReservePlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName, pluginNewFunc, \"Reserve\")\n}\n\n// RegisterPermitPlugin returns a function to register a Permit Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterPermitPlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName, pluginNewFunc, \"Permit\")\n}\n\n// RegisterPreBindPlugin returns a function to register a PreBind Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterPreBindPlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName, pluginNewFunc, \"PreBind\")\n}\n\n// RegisterScorePlugin returns a function to register a Score Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterScorePlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory, weight int32) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensionsWithWeight(pluginName, weight, pluginNewFunc, \"Score\")\n}\n\n// RegisterPreScorePlugin returns a function to register a Score Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterPreScorePlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName, pluginNewFunc, \"PreScore\")\n}\n\n// RegisterBindPlugin returns a function to register a Bind Plugin to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterBindPlugin(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName, pluginNewFunc, \"Bind\")\n}\n\n// RegisterPluginAsExtensions returns a function to register a Plugin as given extensionPoints to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterPluginAsExtensions(pluginName string, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory, extensions ...string) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn RegisterPluginAsExtensionsWithWeight(pluginName, 1, pluginNewFunc, extensions...)\n}\n\n// RegisterPluginAsExtensionsWithWeight returns a function to register a Plugin as given extensionPoints with weight to a given registry.\nfunc RegisterPluginAsExtensionsWithWeight(pluginName string, weight int32, pluginNewFunc runtime.PluginFactory, extensions ...string) RegisterPluginFunc {\n\treturn func(reg *runtime.Registry, profile *schedulerapi.KubeSchedulerProfile) {\n\t\treg.Register(pluginName, pluginNewFunc)\n\t\tfor _, extension := range extensions {\n\t\t\tps := getPluginSetByExtension(profile.Plugins, extension)\n\t\t\tif ps == nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tps.Enabled = append(ps.Enabled, schedulerapi.Plugin{Name: pluginName, Weight: weight})\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Use defaults from latest config API version.\n\t\tvar gvk schema.GroupVersionKind\n\t\tgvk = kubeschedulerconfigv1.SchemeGroupVersion.WithKind(pluginName + \"Args\")\n\t\tif args, _, err := configDecoder.Decode(nil, &gvk, nil); err == nil {\n\t\t\tprofile.PluginConfig = append(profile.PluginConfig, schedulerapi.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\tName: pluginName,\n\t\t\t\tArgs: args,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc getPluginSetByExtension(plugins *schedulerapi.Plugins, extension string) *schedulerapi.PluginSet {\n\tswitch extension {\n\tcase \"QueueSort\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.QueueSort\n\tcase \"Filter\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.Filter\n\tcase \"PreFilter\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.PreFilter\n\tcase \"PreScore\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.PreScore\n\tcase \"Score\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.Score\n\tcase \"Bind\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.Bind\n\tcase \"Reserve\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.Reserve\n\tcase \"Permit\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.Permit\n\tcase \"PreBind\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.PreBind\n\tcase \"PostBind\":\n\t\treturn &plugins.PostBind\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// BuildNodeInfos build NodeInfo slice from a v1.Node slice\nfunc BuildNodeInfos(nodes []*v1.Node) []*framework.NodeInfo {\n\tres := make([]*framework.NodeInfo, len(nodes))\n\tfor i := 0; i < len(nodes); i++ {\n\t\tres[i] = framework.NewNodeInfo()\n\t\tres[i].SetNode(nodes[i])\n\t}\n\treturn res\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": true,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

        "+  profile := &schedulerapi.KubeSchedulingProfile{",

        "   }"

        "-  return func(reg *runtime.Registry, profile *schedulerapi.KubeSchedulerProfile) {",
        "+  return func(reg *runtime.Registry, profile *schedulerapi.KubeSchedulingProfile) {",

  "originalFile": "/*\nCopyright 2020 The Kubernetes Authors.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\npackage scheme\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\tcorev1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\"\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/kube-scheduler/config/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/apis/config\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/apis/config/testing/defaults\"\n\t\"k8s.io/utils/ptr\"\n\t\"sigs.k8s.io/yaml\"\n)\n\n// TestCodecsDecodePluginConfig tests that embedded plugin args get decoded\n// into their appropriate internal types and defaults are applied.\nfunc TestCodecsDecodePluginConfig(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\tdata         []byte\n\t\twantErr      string\n\t\twantProfiles []config.KubeSchedulerProfile\n\t}{\n\t\t// v1 tests\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"v1 all plugin args in default profile\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - name: DefaultPreemption\n    args:\n      minCandidateNodesPercentage: 50\n      minCandidateNodesAbsolute: 500\n  - name: InterPodAffinity\n    args:\n      hardPodAffinityWeight: 5\n  - name: NodeResourcesFit\n    args:\n      ignoredResources: [\"foo\"]\n  - name: PodTopologySpread\n    args:\n      defaultConstraints:\n      - maxSkew: 1\n        topologyKey: zone\n        whenUnsatisfiable: ScheduleAnyway\n  - name: VolumeBinding\n    args:\n      bindTimeoutSeconds: 300\n  - name: NodeAffinity\n    args:\n      addedAffinity:\n        requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:\n          nodeSelectorTerms:\n          - matchExpressions:\n            - key: foo\n              operator: In\n              values: [\"bar\"]\n  - name: NodeResourcesBalancedAllocation\n    args:\n      resources:\n        - name: cpu       # default weight(1) will be set.\n        - name: memory    # weight 0 will be replaced by 1.\n          weight: 0\n        - name: scalar0\n          weight: 1\n        - name: scalar1   # default weight(1) will be set for scalar1\n        - name: scalar2   # weight 0 will be replaced by 1.\n          weight: 0\n        - name: scalar3\n          weight: 2\n`),\n\t\t\twantProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName:            \"default-scheduler\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPercentageOfNodesToScore: nil,\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins:                  defaults.PluginsV1,\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"DefaultPreemption\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.DefaultPreemptionArgs{MinCandidateNodesPercentage: 50, MinCandidateNodesAbsolute: 500},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"InterPodAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{HardPodAffinityWeight: 5},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeResourcesFit\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeResourcesFitArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tIgnoredResources: []string{\"foo\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tScoringStrategy: &config.ScoringStrategy{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: config.LeastAllocated,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []config.ResourceSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"memory\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"PodTopologySpread\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.PodTopologySpreadArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tDefaultConstraints: []corev1.TopologySpreadConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{MaxSkew: 1, TopologyKey: \"zone\", WhenUnsatisfiable: corev1.ScheduleAnyway},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tDefaultingType: config.SystemDefaulting,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"VolumeBinding\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.VolumeBindingArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBindTimeoutSeconds: 300,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAddedAffinity: &corev1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: &corev1.NodeSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNodeSelectorTerms: []corev1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []corev1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: corev1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"bar\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeResourcesBalancedAllocation\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeResourcesBalancedAllocationArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []config.ResourceSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"memory\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"scalar0\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"scalar1\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"scalar2\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"scalar3\", Weight: 2}},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"v1 with non-default global percentageOfNodesToScore\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\npercentageOfNodesToScore: 10\n`),\n\t\t\twantProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName:            \"default-scheduler\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPercentageOfNodesToScore: nil,\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins:                  defaults.PluginsV1,\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig:             defaults.PluginConfigsV1,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"v1 with non-default global and profile percentageOfNodesToScore\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\npercentageOfNodesToScore: 10\nprofiles:\n- percentageOfNodesToScore: 20\n`),\n\t\t\twantProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName:            \"default-scheduler\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPercentageOfNodesToScore: ptr.To[int32](20),\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins:                  defaults.PluginsV1,\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig:             defaults.PluginConfigsV1,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"v1 plugins can include version and kind\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - name: DefaultPreemption\n    args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      kind: DefaultPreemptionArgs\n      minCandidateNodesPercentage: 50\n`),\n\t\t\twantProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"default-scheduler\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins:       defaults.PluginsV1,\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"DefaultPreemption\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.DefaultPreemptionArgs{MinCandidateNodesPercentage: 50, MinCandidateNodesAbsolute: 100},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"InterPodAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tHardPodAffinityWeight: 1,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeResourcesBalancedAllocation\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeResourcesBalancedAllocationArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []config.ResourceSpec{{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1}, {Name: \"memory\", Weight: 1}},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeResourcesFit\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeResourcesFitArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tScoringStrategy: &config.ScoringStrategy{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: config.LeastAllocated,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []config.ResourceSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"memory\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"PodTopologySpread\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.PodTopologySpreadArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tDefaultingType: config.SystemDefaulting,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"VolumeBinding\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.VolumeBindingArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBindTimeoutSeconds: 600,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"plugin group and kind should match the type\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - name: DefaultPreemption\n    args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      kind: InterPodAffinityArgs\n`),\n\t\t\twantErr: `decoding .profiles[0].pluginConfig[0]: args for plugin DefaultPreemption were not of type DefaultPreemptionArgs.kubescheduler.config.k8s.io, got InterPodAffinityArgs.kubescheduler.config.k8s.io`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"v1 NodResourcesFitArgs shape encoding is strict\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - name: NodeResourcesFit\n    args:\n      scoringStrategy:\n        requestedToCapacityRatio:\n          shape:\n          - Score: 2\n            Utilization: 1\n`),\n\t\t\twantErr: `strict decoding error: decoding .profiles[0].pluginConfig[0]: strict decoding error: decoding args for plugin NodeResourcesFit: strict decoding error: unknown field \"scoringStrategy.requestedToCapacityRatio.shape[0].Score\", unknown field \"scoringStrategy.requestedToCapacityRatio.shape[0].Utilization\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"v1 NodeResourcesFitArgs resources encoding is strict\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - name: NodeResourcesFit\n    args:\n      scoringStrategy:\n        resources:\n        - Name: cpu\n          Weight: 1\n`),\n\t\t\twantErr: `strict decoding error: decoding .profiles[0].pluginConfig[0]: strict decoding error: decoding args for plugin NodeResourcesFit: strict decoding error: unknown field \"scoringStrategy.resources[0].Name\", unknown field \"scoringStrategy.resources[0].Weight\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"out-of-tree plugin args\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - name: OutOfTreePlugin\n    args:\n      foo: bar\n`),\n\t\t\twantProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"default-scheduler\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins:       defaults.PluginsV1,\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: append([]config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"OutOfTreePlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &runtime.Unknown{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tContentType: \"application/json\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRaw:         []byte(`{\"foo\":\"bar\"}`),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}, defaults.PluginConfigsV1...),\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"empty and no plugin args\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - name: DefaultPreemption\n    args:\n  - name: InterPodAffinity\n    args:\n  - name: NodeResourcesFit\n  - name: OutOfTreePlugin\n    args:\n  - name: VolumeBinding\n    args:\n  - name: PodTopologySpread\n  - name: NodeAffinity\n  - name: NodeResourcesBalancedAllocation\n`),\n\t\t\twantProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"default-scheduler\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins:       defaults.PluginsV1,\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"DefaultPreemption\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.DefaultPreemptionArgs{MinCandidateNodesPercentage: 10, MinCandidateNodesAbsolute: 100},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"InterPodAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tHardPodAffinityWeight: 1,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeResourcesFit\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeResourcesFitArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tScoringStrategy: &config.ScoringStrategy{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: config.LeastAllocated,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []config.ResourceSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"memory\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"OutOfTreePlugin\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"VolumeBinding\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: 1}},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"ignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods is enabled\",\n\t\t\tdata: []byte(`\napiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - name: InterPodAffinity\n    args:\n      ignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: true\n`),\n\t\t\twantProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: \"default-scheduler\",\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins:       defaults.PluginsV1,\n\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"InterPodAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tHardPodAffinityWeight: &config.NodeResourcesBalancedAllocationArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []config.ResourceSpec{{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1}, {Name: \"memory\", Weight: 1}},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeResourcesFit\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeResourcesFitArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tScoringStrategy: &config.ScoringStrategy{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: config.LeastAllocated,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []config.ResourceSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"memory\", Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"PodTopologySpread\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.PodTopologySpreadArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tDefaultingType: config.SystemDefaulting,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"VolumeBinding\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.VolumeBindingArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBindTimeoutSeconds: 600,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tdecoder := Codecs.UniversalDecoder()\n\tfor _, tt := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tobj, gvk, err := decoder.Decode(tt.data, nil, nil)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif tt.wantErr != err.Error() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"\\ngot err:\\n\\t%v\\nwant:\\n\\t%s\", err, tt.wantErr)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif len(tt.wantErr) != 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"no error produced, wanted %v\", tt.wantErr)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tgot, ok := obj.(*config.KubeSchedulerConfiguration)\n\t\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"decoded into %s, want %s\", gvk, config.SchemeGroupVersion.WithKind(\"KubeSchedulerConfiguration\"))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(tt.wantProfiles, got.Profiles); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected configuration (-want,+got):\\n%s\", diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestCodecsEncodePluginConfig(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname    string\n\t\tobj     runtime.Object\n\t\tversion schema.GroupVersion\n\t\twant    string\n\t}{\n\t\t//v1 tests\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"v1 in-tree and out-of-tree plugins\",\n\t\t\tversion: v1.SchemeGroupVersion,\n\t\t\tobj: &v1.KubeSchedulerConfiguration{\n\t\t\t\tProfiles: []v1.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []v1.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"InterPodAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: runtime.RawExtension{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tObject: &v1.InterPodAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tHardPodAffinityWeight: ptr.To[int32](5),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"VolumeBinding\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: runtime.RawExtension{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tObject: &v1.VolumeBindingArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBindTimeoutSeconds: ptr.To[int64](300),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tShape: []v1.UtilizationShapePoint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tUtilization: 0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tScore:       0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tUtilization: 100,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tScore:       10,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeResourcesFit\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: runtime.RawExtension{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tObject: &v1.NodeResourcesFitArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tScoringStrategy: &v1.ScoringStrategy{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:      v1.RequestedToCapacityRatio,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []v1.ResourceSpec{{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1}},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRequestedToCapacityRatio: &v1.RequestedToCapacityRatioParam{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tShape: []v1.UtilizationShapePoint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Utilization: 1, Score: 2},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"PodTopologySpread\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: runtime.RawExtension{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tObject: &v1.PodTopologySpreadArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tDefaultConstraints: []corev1.TopologySpreadConstraint{},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"OutOfTreePlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: runtime.RawExtension{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRaw: []byte(`{\"foo\":\"bar\"}`),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: `apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nclientConnection:\n  acceptContentTypes: \"\"\n  burst: 0\n  contentType: \"\"\n  kubeconfig: \"\"\n  qps: 0\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nleaderElection:\n  leaderElect: null\n  leaseDuration: 0s\n  renewDeadline: 0s\n  resourceLock: \"\"\n  resourceName: \"\"\n  resourceNamespace: \"\"\n  retryPeriod: 0s\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      hardPodAffinityWeight: 5\n      ignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: false\n      kind: InterPodAffinityArgs\n    name: InterPodAffinity\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      bindTimeoutSeconds: 300\n      kind: VolumeBindingArgs\n      shape:\n      - score: 0\n        utilization: 0\n      - score: 10\n        utilization: 100\n    name: VolumeBinding\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      kind: NodeResourcesFitArgs\n      scoringStrategy:\n        requestedToCapacityRatio:\n          shape:\n          - score: 2\n            utilization: 1\n        resources:\n        - name: cpu\n          weight: 1\n        type: RequestedToCapacityRatio\n    name: NodeResourcesFit\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      kind: PodTopologySpreadArgs\n    name: PodTopologySpread\n  - args:\n      foo: bar\n    name: OutOfTreePlugin\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"v1 in-tree and out-of-tree plugins from internal\",\n\t\t\tversion: v1.SchemeGroupVersion,\n\t\t\tobj: &config.KubeSchedulerConfiguration{\n\t\t\t\tParallelism:           8,\n\t\t\t\tDelayCacheUntilActive: true,\n\t\t\t\tProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"InterPodAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tHardPodAffinityWeight: 5,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"NodeResourcesFit\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.NodeResourcesFitArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tScoringStrategy: &config.ScoringStrategy{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:      config.LeastAllocated,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tResources: []config.ResourceSpec{{Name: \"cpu\", Weight: 1}},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"VolumeBinding\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.VolumeBindingArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBindTimeoutSeconds: 300,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"PodTopologySpread\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.PodTopologySpreadArgs{},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"OutOfTreePlugin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &runtime.Unknown{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRaw: []byte(`{\"foo\":\"bar\"}`),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: `apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nclientConnection:\n  acceptContentTypes: \"\"\n  burst: 0\n  contentType: \"\"\n  kubeconfig: \"\"\n  qps: 0\ndelayCacheUntilActive: true\nenableContentionProfiling: false\nenableProfiling: false\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nleaderElection:\n  leaderElect: false\n  leaseDuration: 0s\n  renewDeadline: 0s\n  resourceLock: \"\"\n  resourceName: \"\"\n  resourceNamespace: \"\"\n  retryPeriod: 0s\nparallelism: 8\npodInitialBackoffSeconds: 0\npodMaxBackoffSeconds: 0\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      hardPodAffinityWeight: 5\n      ignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: false\n      kind: InterPodAffinityArgs\n    name: InterPodAffinity\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      kind: NodeResourcesFitArgs\n      scoringStrategy:\n        resources:\n        - name: cpu\n          weight: 1\n        type: LeastAllocated\n    name: NodeResourcesFit\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      bindTimeoutSeconds: 300\n      kind: VolumeBindingArgs\n    name: VolumeBinding\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      kind: PodTopologySpreadArgs\n    name: PodTopologySpread\n  - args:\n      foo: bar\n    name: OutOfTreePlugin\n  schedulerName: \"\"\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"v1 ignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods is enabled\",\n\t\t\tversion: v1.SchemeGroupVersion,\n\t\t\tobj: &config.KubeSchedulerConfiguration{\n\t\t\t\tParallelism:           8,\n\t\t\t\tDelayCacheUntilActive: true,\n\t\t\t\tProfiles: []config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"InterPodAffinity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tArgs: &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tHardPodAffinityWeight:              5,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tIgnorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twant: `apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\nclientConnection:\n  acceptContentTypes: \"\"\n  burst: 0\n  contentType: \"\"\n  kubeconfig: \"\"\n  qps: 0\ndelayCacheUntilActive: true\nenableContentionProfiling: false\nenableProfiling: false\nkind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration\nleaderElection:\n  leaderElect: false\n  leaseDuration: 0s\n  renewDeadline: 0s\n  resourceLock: \"\"\n  resourceName: \"\"\n  resourceNamespace: \"\"\n  retryPeriod: 0s\nparallelism: 8\npodInitialBackoffSeconds: 0\npodMaxBackoffSeconds: 0\nprofiles:\n- pluginConfig:\n  - args:\n      apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1\n      hardPodAffinityWeight: 5\n      ignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: true\n      kind: InterPodAffinityArgs\n    name: InterPodAffinity\n  schedulerName: \"\"\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tyamlInfo, ok := runtime.SerializerInfoForMediaType(Codecs.SupportedMediaTypes(), runtime.ContentTypeYAML)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"unable to locate encoder -- %q is not a supported media type\", runtime.ContentTypeYAML)\n\t}\n\tjsonInfo, ok := runtime.SerializerInfoForMediaType(Codecs.SupportedMediaTypes(), runtime.ContentTypeJSON)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"unable to locate encoder -- %q is not a supported media type\", runtime.ContentTypeJSON)\n\t}\n\tfor _, tt := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tencoder := Codecs.EncoderForVersion(yamlInfo.Serializer, tt.version)\n\t\t\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\t\t\tif err := encoder.Encode(tt.obj, &buf); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(tt.want, buf.String()); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected encoded configuration:\\n%s\", diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tencoder = Codecs.EncoderForVersion(jsonInfo.Serializer, tt.version)\n\t\t\tbuf = bytes.Buffer{}\n\t\t\tif err := encoder.Encode(tt.obj, &buf); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tout, err := yaml.JSONToYAML(buf.Bytes())\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(tt.want, string(out)); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected encoded configuration:\\n%s\", diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

  "newString": "KubeSchedulingProfile",
  "oldString": "KubeSchedulerProfile",
